textByHash.6635d670bb356eb8954715a9ea66fac59100e89f: This is TzHaar terminal chamber, TzHaar rest here to draw warmth from the volcano.
textByHash.841ad81be236d603b81939c440c15ecbee0483b2: As TzHaar grow older we lose heat and begin to solidify. Drawing heat from the volcano allows us to prolong this process.
textByHash.93bb841f5ad3ba4ecc303a722391911d2dcda6f8: Over time TzHaar will eventually harden and cease to be molten entirely before turning to rock, known as Haar-Tok.
textByHash.75d2e94ad1131c78a12a72665107d0cbb8625926: In essence yes, as Haar-Tok can not move or communicate but the former TzHaar remains conscious.
